name: Nervous Precinct Convert
text:
When Nervous Precinct Convert dies, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and each other player you converted nods grimly.
Whenever you remove a doom counter from the Doomsday Clock, Nervous Precinct Convert gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Hope is, briefly, a stat boost.
flavorText: Joined the caucus for the free snacks. Stayed for the existential dread.
